title: Loot Bundles
description: This mods adds powerful magical bundles
body:
**!!Reason: this mod just didn't work out as I expected, and I couldn't keep managing it**

**This mod adds 9 new bundles**
1. Ancient bundle(dropped by wardens)
2. Brute bundle(dropped by piglin brutes)
3. Ending bundle(found in end cities)
4. Mining bundle(found in dungeons)
5. Monsterous bundle(dropped by zombies)
6. Nether bundle(dropped by wither boss)
7. Oceanic bundle(dropped by elder guardians)
8. Pillage Bundle(found in pillager outpost)
9. Wandering bundle(dropped by wandering trader)
   
   **THIS MOD ALSO ADDS ECHO SHEARS USED TO OPEN THE MAGIC BUNDLES**
    
   _Every item has its own lore._

<details>
<summary>Items</summary>
  
1. Ancient bundle: Echoing Blade | Harp of Echos
  
2. Brute bundle: Brutes Axe | Golden Goblet | Brute's Armplate
   
3. Ending bundle: Trinket of Luck(trinket) | Blade of Endings | Pearl of motion
   
4. Mining bundle: The six Miner's Pickaxes | Mining Dynamite
   
5. Monsterous bundle: Bone Armor | Book of Knowledge
   
6. Nether bundle: Blade of Decay | Totem of Hell
   
7. Oceanic bundle: Marine Core | Guardian Throns | Elder Thorns (+ trident recipe) | Hellish enchantment
   
8. Pillage Bundle: Horn of Pillaging | Herbs of omen(useless for now) | Omen Potion | Betrayal enchantment
   
9. Wandering bundle: Mallet of Sattering | Mysterious Spices (+ Bottle of mysteries that gives random effects)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>
-Hellish(from oceanic bundle): Can be applied on a trident. It give the trident fire aspect and a vertical knockback.

-Betrayal(max level 5)(from pillage bundle): Does extra damage to illagers

</details>
